[Solution-Treated Rod/Bar/Plate] UTS 724–896 MPa, σy 290–414 MPa, El 65–40%. [Sheet/Strip Annealed] UTS 827–1034 MPa, σy 414–621 MPa. 온도의존(Table 6, 어닐드 봉, 노출온도서 측정): 649°C UTS≈1010 MPa·σy≈734 MPa, 760°C UTS≈585 MPa·σy≈545 MPa, 871°C UTS≈284 MPa·σy≈276 MPa. E(Annealed, 인장): RT 207.5 GPa→649°C 170.3 GPa→871°C 147.5 GPa. CTE(70°F기준): 93°C 12.8, 538°C 14.0, 871°C 15.8 µm/m·°C. Creep·rupture는 solution-treated/annealed 곡선(Fig 11–14)으로 제시. 조건: annealed 1700–1900°F / solution-treated 2000–2200°F.

records.keyProps: Verified directly from API 5L PSL2 spec table (L450Q/X65Q & L450M/X65M row): yield strength Rt0.5 min 450 MPa (65,300 psi), max 600 MPa (87,000 psi); tensile strength Rm min 535 MPa (77,600 psi), max 760 MPa (110,200 psi); Rt0.5/Rm ratio max 0.93. records.notes: Governing standard API 5L (45th ed.) / ISO 3183, grade L450 (= X65). PSL2 (higher quality level) imposes the σy MAX (600 MPa) and UTS MAX (760 MPa) caps and Rt0.5/Rm ≤0.93 ratio cap that PSL1 lacks — these maxima are important for the DB since X65 is a banded (min AND max) grade, not just a floor. Two delivery/HT routes share the same property band: X65Q (quenched & tempered) and X65M (thermomechanically rolled/TMCP). The octalsteel PDF is a faithful, fully-parsed reproduction of the API standard table (verified by direct read). No standalone API.org open datasheet exists (API standards are paywalled); the reproduced table is the best openly-verifiable primary-equivalent source.

HT condition is load-bearing for this grade: the Q&T route gives σy ≥585 MPa with retained −196 °C toughness; the optional QTT (double-temper) trades slight strength for higher elongation and better resistance to strain-aging — a clear HT-multiplier datapoint.
